step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the assessment of agent1 and my own initial evaluation. raw_response:
I agree with the assessment of agent1 and my own initial evaluation. One additional point supporting this view is that carboxylates often require more thorough removal post-cement placement compared to other types because of residual EDTA, further emphasizing their potential for causing irritation if not completely removed from the root canal system.

Answer: A.
